features.name: never-instantiated module with constant-driven output
features.description: Code should include a module that is declared in the design but never instantiated anywhere in the hierarchy, where its output port is assigned a constant value

features.name: module with undriven output port
features.description: Code should include a module that has an output port with no driving assignment or procedural statement, leaving the output in an undriven state

features.name: multi-module circuit with partially instantiated hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a circuit with two or more module definitions where only a subset of modules is instantiated, leaving the others as dead declarations
